{% assign articles = site.articles | sort: "date" | reverse %}
{%- for article in articles %}
================================================================================
TITLE: {{ article.title }}
AUTHORS: {% for a in article.authors %}{{ a.name }}{% if a.orcid %} (ORCID: {{ a.orcid }}){% endif %}{% unless forloop.last %}, {% endunless %}{% endfor %}

JOURNAL: {{ article.journal }}{% if article.volume %}, vol. {{ article.volume }}{% endif %}{% if article.issue %}, no. {{ article.issue }}{% endif %}{% if article.pages %}, pp. {{ article.pages }}{% endif %}
YEAR: {{ article.year }}
DATE: {{ article.date | date: '%Y-%m-%d' }}
DOI: https://doi.org/{{ article.doi }}
URL: {{ article.url | absolute_url }}
{% if article.keywords %}KEYWORDS: {{ article.keywords | join: ", " }}{% endif %}
{% if article.license %}LICENSE: {{ article.license }}{% endif %}

ABSTRACT:
{{ article.abstract }}

FULL TEXT:
{{ article.content | strip_html | strip }}

{% endfor %}
